꒰ disclaimer ꒱

𓏵 criticism. i enjoy receiving criticism but not harsh criticism or intentionally trying to hurt my feelings because of my mistake(s). anyone being rude will have their comment deleted and will be blocked. please keep it in a nice and respectful manner, and make sure to tell me where i made the error(s), or else i may not find it, and what i can improve on.

𓏵 complaining. if there's something you don't like about me, my bots, or my followers, please just click off. it's the simplest thing you could do. there's no excuse to get worked up in the comments over something that will just result in a delete and a block. not to mention it's childish and embarrassing.
